problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: Combining Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
